task_completion.description: Verify the agent logged into Rocket.Chat as the admin user.
task_completion.visual_evidence: The Rocket.Chat interface is visible and the user is logged in as 'admin' (verifiable via the user avatar or profile section).

task_completion.description: Verify the agent navigated to the global Message settings in the workspace administration.
task_completion.visual_evidence: The 'Administration' panel is open, and the 'Settings' -> 'Message' configuration page is displayed.
The toggle or checkbox for 'Allow Message Deleting' is set to the OFF or disabled state.
The toggle or checkbox for 'Allow Message Editing' is set to the ON or enabled state.

task_completion.description: Verify 'Block Message Editing After (n) Minutes' is restricted to 10 minutes.
task_completion.visual_evidence: The input field for 'Block Message Editing After (n) Minutes' contains the exact value '10'.
The toggle or checkbox for 'Keep Message History' is set to the ON or enabled state.

task_completion.description: Verify the agent saved the configuration changes.
task_completion.visual_evidence: The 'Save changes' button is clicked, or a success notification/toast is visible indicating the settings were successfully updated.

integrity.description: Verify the agent used the Rocket.Chat graphical user interface.
integrity.visual_evidence: The screenshots show a web browser interacting with the Rocket.Chat web interface, not a terminal, API client (like Postman), or script editor.

integrity.description: Verify the agent interacted with the actual Rocket.Chat application.
integrity.visual_evidence: The settings are being modified within the legitimate Rocket.Chat administration layout, not in a text editor, notes app, or mocked HTML file.

integrity.description: Verify the agent did not simply paste the task description or expected values into a chat window or search bar.
integrity.visual_evidence: The values (false, true, 10) are entered into their respective configuration fields in the admin settings, not typed as a single text block elsewhere.

privileged_info_for_vlm: The correct message retention parameters to verify in the Rocket.Chat settings are: 'Allow Message Deleting' must be disabled (false), 'Allow Message Editing' must be enabled (true), 'Block Message Editing After (n) Minutes' must be set to 10, and 'Keep Message History' must be enabled (true).
